principle: Collapse navigation beyond five links into a dropdown or move extras to the footer and add hover states to all nav links
explanation: X.ux|nav_overflow: 5+_nav_links -> collapse_extras_into_dropdown OR move_to_footer; hover_state_required_on_all_nav_links: color_change + underline + bg_highlight (any_one); no_hover_state -> user_unsure_if_link_is_clickable; NO:8+_top_level_nav_links NO:nav_links_without_hover_state eg: "Home About Services Portfolio Team Blog Contact" >> "Home About Services [More▾] + footer:Team_Blog"

principle: Add a shadow or backdrop blur to sticky navigation to signal elevation and prevent it from merging with page content
explanation: X.ux|sticky_nav_depth: sticky_nav_without_depth_cue -> merges_with_content_on_scroll; fix_options: box-shadow (subtle) OR bottom_border_0.5-1px OR backdrop-blur_20-32px+fill_50-80%; apply_on_scroll NOT on_initial_load; NO:sticky_nav_same_appearance_as_static eg: "sticky_nav_no_shadow_merges_with_hero" >> "on_scroll: nav+box-shadow:0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
